parameters.jsonBody:
={
    "includeWebResults": true,
    "language": "en",
    "locationQuery": "{{ $json.data.Location }}",
    "maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch":{{ $json.data['Lead Number'] }} ,
    "maxImages": 0,
    "maximumLeadsEnrichmentRecords": 0,
    "scrapeContacts": true,
    "scrapeDirectories": true,
    "scrapeImageAuthors": true,
    "scrapePlaceDetailPage": true,
    "scrapeReviewsPersonalData": true,
    "scrapeTableReservationProvider": true,
    "searchStringsArray": [
        "{{ $json.data['Business Type'] }}"
    ],
    "skipClosedPlaces": true
}

attributes.name: Email Address
attributes.description: =find out the best only one email address from the website after scraping the website. The mail address have to be in ideal format.

parameters.text:
=You are a perfect cold mail generator for a Digital Marketing Agency named Upward Engine.

Here's the Information about the Recipient:

Company Name: {{ $('Loop Over Items1').item.json['Company Name'] }}
Business Type: {{ $('Loop Over Items1').item.json.Category }}

Email Style / Email Tune : {{ $('Send message and wait for response1').item.json.data['Email Style'] }}

The Email style is given just to understand how the mail will be.

Instructions:

1. Always start with giving a greting to the Company like Hi Company Name,
2. Always use We not I.
3. Mail have to be professional, Clean and to the point
4. At last give a Signeture Like:
   [Your Name]
  [Your Company/Agency Name]

attributes.name: Mail Subject
attributes.description: Eye catchy mail Subject for the cold mail

attributes.name: Mail Body
attributes.description: =body message of the mail, a perfect and clear cold mail.
